context_for_next_testing_agent:
## Feature Removal & KYC Refactoring - All Tests Passing

### Backend API Tests (19/19 PASSED):
- TestFeatureRemoval: Marketplace, Luxury Life, TAP Game routes all return 404
- TestHealthCheck: /api/health returns healthy status
- TestKYCRoutes: All KYC endpoints working (/api/kyc/status, /api/kyc/stats, /api/kyc/list)
- TestMiningRoutes: Mining endpoints accessible
- TestLeaderboardRoutes: Leaderboard returning ranked data
- TestAdminStatsEndpoint: Admin stats working
- TestSubscriptionRoutes: Subscription plans endpoint functional
- TestRouterRegistration: All routers properly registered

### Frontend E2E Tests (20/20 PASSED):
- Route Redirects: /marketplace, /orders, /game all redirect to /login (unauthenticated)
- Homepage: Loads with stats cards, branding visible
- Login page: Form elements working
- Static pages: FAQ, How It Works, About, Contact, Privacy all accessible
- API verification: Health, leaderboard, KYC, marketplace 404 all verified

### Key Findings:
1. Marketplace feature completely removed - API returns 404
2. Luxury Life feature completely removed - API returns 404
3. TAP Game feature removed from frontend - routes redirect properly
4. KYC routes successfully extracted to routes/kyc.py - all endpoints functional
5. Admin dashboard working without orders section

### Test Files Created:
- /app/backend/tests/test_feature_removal_refactoring.py (19 tests)
- /app/tests/e2e/feature-removal-verification.spec.ts (20 tests)
